CustomField.description: JSON map of status-code-pattern to dispatcher result. Patterns: exact ("200"), range ("4xx"), default ("default"). Values: "Sent" | "RetryableFailure" | "TerminalFailure". Example: {"2xx":"Sent","429":"RetryableFailure","4xx":"TerminalFailure","5xx":"RetryableFailure","default":"RetryableFailure"}.
CustomField.label: Response Status Rules JSON
